ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the city is located */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "households_with_under_18" INTEGER /* Number of households with children under 18 */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the city (people per square kilometer) */,
  "total_families" REAL /* Total number of families in the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city above sea level in meters */,
  "city_type" TEXT /* Type of city (e.g., metropolitan, suburban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "county_land_area" REAL /* Land area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "countySeat" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the county was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_land_area" REAL /* Land area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Name of the largest city in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the city's population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the city */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the city */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the city's population (e.g., high school, college, graduate degree) */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Racial distribution of the city's population (e.g., white, black, Asian, Hispanic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, planner, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the data (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_log_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Actual report data (e.g., PDF, Excel spreadsheet) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data that was visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, map, scatter plot) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Actual visualization data (e.g., SVG, PNG image) */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)
